label: Molecular weight
description: Estimated exact molecular mass from parsed atoms.

label: cLogP estimate
description: Fragment-style hydrophobicity estimate for rapid triage.

label: H-bond donors
description: Approximate donor count from N/O/S atoms.

label: H-bond acceptors
description: Approximate acceptor count from N/O/S/F atoms.

label: TPSA estimate
description: Fast polar surface proxy used by the bundled model.

label: Ring count
description: Ring closure digit count in SMILES.

label: Aromatic atoms
description: Lowercase aromatic atom tokens in SMILES.
